value.found_quote: When working in **Planning Mode**, the Artifact Review Policy controls how you interact with and approve these plans before changes are made to your codebase.
value.rationale: The page is from Google's Antigravity documentation and explicitly describes the "Artifact Review Policy," which controls how a user reviews and approves agent-proposed plans before changes are made to the codebase. It describes the interactive review workflow including a "Request Review" policy where the agent halts and pauses execution for explicit approval, matching the claim's description of co-steering and pausing at milestones. The page presents this as a current feature with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
